mapper.sql: ac_group_id, ac_group_name, parent_ac_group_id, ar_code, ac_group_level, ac_group_order, biostar_ac_id, biostar_ac_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_ac_group ORDER BY ISNULL(ac_group_level, 0), ISNULL(ac_group_order, 0), ac_group_id
SELECT ar_code FROM tb_ac_group WHERE parent_ac_group_id IS NULL AND ar_code IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ac_group (ac_group_name, parent_ac_group_id, ar_code, ac_group_level, ac_group_order, biostar_ac_id, biostar_ac_name) VALUES (#{acGroupName}, #{parentAcGroupId}, #{arCode}, #{acGroupLevel}, #{acGroupOrder}, #{biostarAcId}, #{biostarAcName})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ac_group SET ac_group_name = #{acGroupName}, biostar_ac_id = #{biostarAcId}, biostar_ac_name = #{biostarAcName}, mod_dt = getdate() WHERE ac_group_id = #{acGroupId}
